context: A man is absorbed in a thrilling video game, reacting in real time to the action on the television.

actions.description: Man sits forward on the couch, eyes fixed on the television, fingers ready on the controller.
He presses buttons quickly and shifts the controller as colorful game graphics flash across the screen.
He reacts with a tense smile, then refocuses as the room glows with the television light.
